BasedOnStyle.description: The style used for all options not specifically set in the configuration.

ColumnLimit.description: The column limit. A column limit of 0 means that there is no column limit. In this case, clang-format will respect the input's line breaking decisions within statements.

IndentWidth.description: The number of columns to use for indentation.

TabWidth.description: The number of columns used for tab stops.

UseTab.description: The way to use tab characters in the resulting file.

IndentCaseLabels.description: Indent case labels one level from the switch statement.

IndentCaseBlocks.description: Indent case blocks one level from the case label.

IndentPPDirectives.description: The preprocessor directive indenting style to use.

IndentRequiresClause.description: Indent the requires clause in a template.

LambdaBodyIndentation.description: The indentation style of lambda bodies.

BreakBeforeBraces.description: The brace breaking style to use.

BraceWrapping.description: Control of individual brace wrapping cases. Only active when BreakBeforeBraces is Custom.

AfterCaseLabel.description: Wrap braces after a case label.

AfterClass.description: Wrap braces after a class definition.

AfterControlStatement.description: Wrap braces after a control statement (if/else/for/while/switch).

AfterEnum.description: Wrap braces after an enum definition.

AfterFunction.description: Wrap braces after a function definition.

AfterNamespace.description: Wrap braces after a namespace definition.

AfterStruct.description: Wrap braces after a struct definition.

AfterUnion.description: Wrap braces after a union definition.

AfterExternBlock.description: Wrap braces after an extern block.

BeforeLambdaBody.description: Wrap braces before a lambda body.

SplitEmptyFunction.description: If false, empty function body can be put on a single line.

SplitEmptyRecord.description: If false, empty record (e.g., class, struct or union) body can be put on a single line.

SplitEmptyNamespace.description: If false, empty namespace body can be put on a single line.

AllowShortFunctionsOnASingleLine.description: Dependent on the value, int f() { return 0; } can be put on a single line.

AllowShortIfStatementsOnASingleLine.description: If true, if (a) return; can be put on a single line.

AllowShortLoopsOnASingleLine.description: If true, while (true) continue; can be put on a single line.

AllowShortBlocksOnASingleLine.description: Dependent on the value, while (true) { continue; } can be put on a single line.

AllowShortLambdasOnASingleLine.description: Dependent on the value, auto lambda = []() { return 0; }; can be put on a single line.

AllowShortCaseLabelsOnASingleLine.description: If true, short case labels will be contracted to a single line.

ReferenceAlignment.description: Reference alignment style (overrides PointerAlignment for references).

DerivePointerAlignment.description: If true, analyze the formatted file for the most common alignment of & and *. Pointer and reference alignment styles are then used only as fallback.

SpaceBeforeParens.description: Defines in which cases to put a space before opening parentheses.

SpaceAfterCStyleCast.description: If true, a space is inserted after C style casts.

SpaceAfterLogicalNot.description: If true, a space is inserted after the logical not operator (!).

SpaceAfterTemplateKeyword.description: If true, a space will be inserted after the 'template' keyword.

SpaceAroundPointerQualifiers.description: Defines in which cases to put a space before or after pointer qualifiers.

SpaceBeforeAssignmentOperators.description: If false, spaces will be removed before assignment operators.

SpaceBeforeCaseColon.description: If false, spaces will be removed before case colon.

SpaceBeforeCpp11BracedList.description: If true, a space will be inserted before a C++11 braced list used to initialize an object.

SpaceBeforeCtorInitializerColon.description: If false, spaces will be removed before constructor initializer colon.

SpaceBeforeInheritanceColon.description: If false, spaces will be removed before inheritance colon.

SpaceBeforeRangeBasedForLoopColon.description: If false, spaces will be removed before range-based for loop colon.

SpaceBeforeSquareBrackets.description: If true, spaces will be before [. Lambdas will not be affected.

SpaceInEmptyBlock.description: If true, spaces will be inserted into {}.

SpaceInEmptyParentheses.description: If true, spaces may be inserted into ().

SpacesBeforeTrailingComments.description: The number of spaces before trailing line comments (// - comments).

SpacesInCStyleCastParentheses.description: If true, spaces will be inserted in C style casts.

SpacesInConditionalStatement.description: If true, spaces will be inserted around if/for/switch/while conditions.

SpacesInContainerLiterals.description: If true, spaces are inserted inside container literals (e.g., ObjC and Javascript array and dict literals).

SpacesInParentheses.description: If true, spaces will be inserted after ( and before ).

SpacesInSquareBrackets.description: If true, spaces will be inserted after [ and before ]. Lambdas or unspecified size array declarations will not be affected.

AlignConsecutiveAssignments.description: Style of aligning consecutive assignments. Aligns the assignment operators of consecutive lines.

AlignConsecutiveBitFields.description: Style of aligning consecutive bit fields.

AlignConsecutiveMacros.description: Style of aligning consecutive macro definitions.

AlignAfterOpenBracket.description: If true, horizontally aligns arguments after an open bracket.

AlignEscapedNewlines.description: Options for aligning backslashes in escaped newlines.

AlignOperands.description: If true, horizontally align operands of binary and ternary expressions.

BinPackArguments.description: If false, a function call's arguments will either all be on the same line or will each have their own line.

BinPackParameters.description: If false, a function declaration's parameters will either all be on the same line or will each have their own line.

BreakBeforeBinaryOperators.description: The way to wrap binary operators.

BreakBeforeTernaryOperators.description: If true, ternary operators will be placed after line breaks.

BreakConstructorInitializers.description: The break constructor initializers style to use.

BreakInheritanceList.description: The inheritance list style to use.

BreakStringLiterals.description: Allow breaking string literals when formatting.

BreakTemplateDeclarations.description: The template declaration breaking style to use.

AlwaysBreakTemplateDeclarations.description: The template declaration breaking style to use (deprecated, use BreakTemplateDeclarations).

IncludeBlocks.description: Dependent on the value, multiple #include blocks can be sorted as one and divided based on category.

SortIncludes.description: Controls if and how clang-format will sort #includes.

SortUsingDeclarations.description: Controls if and how clang-format will sort using declarations.

MaxEmptyLinesToKeep.description: The maximum number of consecutive empty lines to keep.

EmptyLineBeforeAccessModifier.description: Defines in which cases to put empty line before access modifiers.

EmptyLineAfterAccessModifier.description: Defines in which cases to put empty line after access modifiers.

KeepEmptyLinesAtTheStartOfBlocks.description: If true, the empty line at the start of blocks is kept.

SeparateDefinitionBlocks.description: Specifies the use of empty lines to separate definition blocks, including classes, structs, enums, and functions.

CommentPragmas.description: A regular expression that describes comments with special meaning, which should not be split across lines or otherwise changed.

ReflowComments.description: If true, clang-format will attempt to re-flow comments.

FixNamespaceComments.description: If true, clang-format adds missing namespace end comments for short namespaces and fixes invalid existing ones.

ShortNamespaceLines.description: The maximal number of unwrapped lines that a short namespace spans. Applies to FixNamespaceComments.

MacroBlockBegin.description: A regular expression matching macros that start a block.

MacroBlockEnd.description: A regular expression matching macros that end a block.

ForEachMacros.description: A vector of macros that should be interpreted as foreach loops instead of as function calls (semicolon-separated).

StatementMacros.description: A vector of macros that should be interpreted as complete statements (semicolon-separated).

WhitespaceSensitiveMacros.description: A vector of macros which are whitespace-sensitive and should not be touched (semicolon-separated).

RequiresClausePosition.description: The position of the requires clause.

RequiresExpressionIndentation.description: The indentation used for requires expression bodies.

AccessModifierOffset.description: The extra indent or outdent of access modifiers, e.g. public:.

ConstructorInitializerIndentWidth.description: The number of characters to use for indentation of constructor initializer lists as well as inheritance lists.

PackConstructorInitializers.description: The pack constructor initializers style to use.

PenaltyBreakAssignment.description: The penalty for breaking around an assignment operator.

PenaltyBreakBeforeFirstCallParameter.description: The penalty for breaking a function call after call's opening parenthesis.

PenaltyBreakComment.description: The penalty for each line break introduced inside a comment.

PenaltyBreakFirstLessLess.description: The penalty for breaking before the first <<.

PenaltyBreakString.description: The penalty for each line break introduced inside a string literal.

PenaltyExcessCharacter.description: The penalty for each character outside of the column limit.

PenaltyReturnTypeOnItsOwnLine.description: Penalty for putting the return type of a function onto its own line.
